evidence.q1: Sections numbered 1 through 15 sequentially, no broken internal cross-references.
evidence.q2: Defined terms 'Personal Data,' 'Processing,' 'Personal Data Breach' in §2 and used consistently throughout (e.g., 'Personal Data Breach' in §8).
evidence.q3: 'within 24 hours' (§8), 'within 10 business days' (§9, §12, §13), '30 days' (§10), '365 days' (§15) – all specific and commercial.
evidence.q4: No archaic phrasing; language is modern (e.g., 'Vendor will maintain administrative, technical, and physical safeguards…' §5).
evidence.q5: All sentences grammatically sound; for example, §14 liability clause is complex but not contradictory or broken.
evidence.q6: Uniform register across sections – consistent use of 'Vendor will…' and 'Customer may…' without stylistic shifts.
